sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_profiles (id Int32, profile_name String, value Float64);
INSERT INTO test_profiles VALUES (1, 'default', 10.0), (2, 'custom', 20.0), (3, NULL, NULL);
SELECT profile_name, value FROM test_profiles WHERE defaultProfiles() < (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_profiles WHERE profile_name IS NOT NULL);
SELECT id, profile_name FROM test_profiles WHERE value < (SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_profiles WHERE profile_name IS NOT NULL) OR profile_name < 'z';
SELECT profile_name, count(*) AS count_profiles FROM test_profiles GROUP BY profile_name HAVING count_profiles < defaultProfiles();
SELECT profile_name, value FROM test_profiles t1 JOIN (SELECT AVG(value) AS avg_value FROM test_profiles WHERE value IS NOT NULL) t2 ON t1.value < t2.avg_value WHERE defaultProfiles() < 2;
SELECT id FROM (SELECT id, value FROM test_profiles WHERE value < 15.0) AS subquery WHERE NULL < (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_profiles WHERE profile_name IS NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE temp_profiles AS SELECT * FROM test_profiles WHERE false; INSERT INTO temp_profiles SELECT defaultProfiles();
WITH (SELECT defaultProfiles() AS profiles) AS derived_data SELECT id FROM test_profiles WHERE value < (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM derived_data) OR profile_name IS NULL;
